title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Gunko, Jarul, Gerd, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: Gunko, make them hear the girl's voice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have lots of friends there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And I love the library too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We'll get you out of there!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because the books teach us so much about the world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that we shouldn't do things they don't like!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the school and library have to disap- pear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I think that will bother everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That's why it's better if I fall!

dialogue.speaker: Jarul
dialogue.text: Master JARUL! Don't worry about me!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 25 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
